question: Map Handicap: paiN.A (-1.5) vs Prison Breakers (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Prison Breakers and paiN Academy in the CCT South America Series #7 Group Stage, scheduled for January 17 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "paiN Academy" if paiN Academy wins 2 or more maps than Prison Breakers in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Prison Breakers".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Dota 2: 9z Team vs Ttgame (BO3) - ESL One Birmingham: North America Closed Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between 9z Team and Ttgame in the ESL One Birmingham: North America Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 4:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "9z Team" if 9z Team win the match against Ttgame.

This market will resolve to "Ttgame" if Ttgame win the match against 9z Team.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Rainbow Six Siege: Team Liquid vs LOUD (BO3) - Six Invitational South America LCQ Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege match between Team Liquid and LOUD in the Six Invitational South America LCQ Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Liquid" if Team Liquid win the match against LOUD.

This market will resolve to "LOUD" if LOUD win the match against Team Liquid.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 18, 4:00PM-8:00PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Solana price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the SOL/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/sol-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream SOL/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between PlayTime and REKONIX in the ESL One Birmingham: Southeast Asia Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 17 at 11:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "REKONIX" if REKONIX secures 7 or more kills than PlayTime in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "PlayTime".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

question: Set 1 Winner: McDonald vs Minaur
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Mackenzie McDonald and Alex de Minaur in the Australian Open ATP, scheduled for January 19 2026.
This market will resolve to “McDonald” if Mackenzie McDonald wins the first set. It will resolve to “Minaur” if Alex de Minaur wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam match statistics.

question: Will DetonatioN FocusMe qualify to Masters Santiago 2026?
description:
The VCT 2026 Pacific Kickoff is scheduled to take place from January 22 to February 15, 2026, in Seoul, South Korea.

This market will resolve according to which teams qualify for Masters Santiago from the VCT 2026 Pacific Kickoff.

If the listed team officially finishes in the top 3 of the 12-team triple-elimination bracket (1st, 2nd, or 3rd place), the market will resolve to "Yes." Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

Ties in standings will be broken according to the official VCT rules.

If the VCT 2026 Pacific Kickoff is canceled, postponed indefinitely, or if the official list of Masters Santiago qualifiers from Pacific is not published before March 1, 2026, ET, this market will resolve to "No."

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Valorant Esports website (https://valorantesports.com). A consensus of credible reporting (e.g., Liquipedia at https://liquipedia.net/valorant/VCT/2026/Pacific_League/Kickoff) may also be used.

question: Will all of Trump’s Greenland Tariffs go into effect by Feb 1?
description:
On January 17, Donald Trump threatened to impose new tariffs on Denmark, Norway, Sweden, France, Germany, The United Kingdom, The Netherlands, and Finland, which would begin on February 1 and would remain in effect until a deal is struck for the US to purchase Greenland (see: https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/115911344443637897).

This market will resolve to “Yes” if any new general tariff or tariffs on imports into the United States from all of the following countries — Denmark, Norway, Sweden, France, Germany, The United Kingdom, The Netherlands, and Finland — goes into effect for any amount of time by February 1, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

For the purpose of this market, "goes into effect" means the start date for the tariffs must have occurred without being further delayed or suspended.

A new general tariff that includes item-specific exceptions will still qualify, as long as a new policy of a general tariff on imports into the United States from all of the listed countries goes into effect.

Only tariffs specifically targeting the listed countries or a specific set of countries including all the listed countries will qualify. For example, a new global tariff (tariffs on all imports into the U.S. from any country) will not count toward this market's resolution.

An increase in the rate of pre-existing general tariffs on imports into the US from all of the listed countries will count.

This market's primary resolution source will be official information from the Trump administration; however, a consensus of credible information may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 19, 6PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Series: Team Falcons Kill Handicap (-32.5) vs Zero Tenacity (+32.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Falcons and Zero Tenacity in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons secures 33 or more kills than Zero Tenacity in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Zero Tenacity".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons secures 34 or more kills than Zero Tenacity in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Zero Tenacity".

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Team Liquid" if Team Liquid secures 34 or more kills than Nigma Galaxy in the match.
